heroHeadline: Russian Drone Strikes Critical Infrastructure at Major Ukrainian Port; Oil Revenue War-High Fuels Continued Offensive
heroSubtitle: Drone attack damages Odesa port infrastructure as Moscow's oil revenues hit highest level since early 2022, bankrolling continued strikes on Ukrainian cities and logistics hubs
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
